expectations.text: Uses ast-grep rewrite (--rewrite flag or YAML fix) to perform the replacement
expectations.evidence: Uses YAML rule with fix: this.logger.error($$$ARGS)

expectations.text: The rewrite uses meta-variables to capture the console.error arguments
expectations.evidence: Uses $$$ARGS multi meta-variable to capture all arguments

expectations.text: The output shows the original and transformed code
The transformation preserves the arguments passed to console.error
expectations.evidence: Arguments 'Failed to load users:', err preserved in transformed file
